zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Lockwood於大約1445年出生在英國貝德福爾艾也沃斯時，她的父親Sir Henry Lockwood22歲，母親Lady Agnes Shaw22歲。她於1465年之前與Sir Roger Anderson結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1510年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Lockwood于大约1445年出生在英国貝德福爾艾也沃斯时，她的父亲Sir Henry Lockwood22岁，母亲Lady Agnes Shaw22岁。她于1465年之前与Sir Roger Anderson结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1510年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lockwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one of three places called Lockwood, one in Yorkshire, one in North Yorkshire and another in Staffordshire. The Yorkshire and Staffordshire placenames both derive from Old English loc ‘lock, enclosure, fold’ + wudu ‘wood’. The North Yorkshire placename derives from Old English loc + Old Norse vithr ‘wood’. The surname appears to have migrated to East Anglia.

variants.name: Logwood
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of   Lockwood  .

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Lockwood was born about 1445, in Eyeworth, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Sir Henry Lockwood, was 22 and her mother, Lady Agnes Shaw, was 22. She married Sir Roger Anderson before 1465. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1510, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Lockwood est née environ 1445, à Eyeworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Lockwood, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Shaw, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Anderson avant 1465. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1510, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Lockwood um 1445 in Eyeworth, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Lockwood 22 und ihre Mutter Lady Agnes Shaw 22. Sie hat vor 1465 Sir Roger Anderson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1510 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Lockwood è nata il circa 1445 nel Eyeworth, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Henry Lockwood, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Lady Agnes Shaw, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger Anderson prima del 1465. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1510, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Lockwoodが約1445年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアエイエウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Lockwoodは22歳，母Lady Agnes Shawは22歳であった。1465年以前にSir Roger Andersonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1510年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Lockwood(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 베드퍼드실르 예워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Lockwood(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes Shaw(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1465년 이전 Sir Roger Anderson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Roger Anderson antes 1465. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1510, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Lockwood родилась около 1445 г. в местности эиюорт, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Lockwood было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Shaw, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Anderson перед 1465 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1510 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.
